flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The University of Alabama fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Alabama are 31% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($59.2k vs $45.2k).
